languages.text: "От разумной речи ты перешел к объективным фактам, но выводы из них так и не озвучил". {n}Тервантьяс говорит почти ласково, неприкрыто наслаждаясь унижением своего оппонента.{/n} "Сделай же их. Признай, что ты умственно неполноценное ничтожество, все знания которого — лишь ворох сомнительных догадок и ритуалов".

"You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."
languages.original_text: "От разумной речи ты перешел к объективным фактам, но выводы из них так и не озвучил". {n}Тервантьяс говорит почти ласково, неприкрыто наслаждаясь унижением своего оппонента.{/n} "Сделай же их. Признай, что ты умственно неполноценное ничтожество, все знания которого — лишь ворох сомнительных догадок и ритуалов".

traits.locale_text: "You have moved from common-sense reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to voice the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

"You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

languages.text: "Ihr habt Euch von gesundem Menschenverstand auf objektive Fakten verlegt, aber keine Schlussfolgerung angestellt." {n}Tervantias spricht beinahe zärtlich und genießt die Demütigung seines Widersachers.{/n} "Dann tut es. Gebt zu, dass Ihr ein debiler Niemand seid, dessen gesamtes Wissen auf dubiosen Spekulationen und törichten Ritualen basiert."
languages.original_text: "You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt Euch von gesundem Menschenverstand auf objektive Fakten verlegt, aber keine Schlussfolgerung angestellt." {n}Tervantias spricht beinahe zärtlich und genießt die Demütigung seines Widersachers.{/n} "Dann tut es. Gebt zu, dass Ihr ein debiler Niemand seid, dessen gesamtes Wissen auf dubiosen Spekulationen und törichten Ritualen basiert."

languages.text: « Vous avez cessé d'énoncer des platitudes pour lister des faits objectifs. Il ne vous reste plus qu'à présenter votre conclusion. » {n}Le ton de Tervantias se fait presque tendre tandis qu'il se délecte ouvertement de l'humiliation de son adversaire.{/n} « Allez-y. Admettez que vous êtes une non-entité mentalement déficiente, que l'intégralité de vos connaissances n'est qu'un ramassis de conjectures et de rituels ineptes. »
languages.original_text: "You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez cessé d'énoncer des platitudes pour lister des faits objectifs. Il ne vous reste plus qu'à présenter votre conclusion. » {n}Le ton de Tervantias se fait presque tendre tandis qu'il se délecte ouvertement de l'humiliation de son adversaire.{/n} « Allez-y. Admettez que vous êtes une non-entité mentalement déficiente, que l'intégralité de vos connaissances n'est qu'un ramassis de conjectures et de rituels ineptes. »

languages.text: «Has pasado del razonamiento sencillo a los hechos objetivos, pero sigues sin extraer conclusiones». {n}Tervantias habla casi con ternura, disfrutando abiertamente de la humillación de su oponente.{/n} «Adelante. Admite que eres deficiente mental y que todo tu saber es un montón de conjeturas y rituales absurdos».
languages.original_text: "You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

traits.locale_text: «Has pasado del razonamiento sencillo a los hechos objetivos, pero sigues sin extraer conclusiones». {n}Tervantias habla casi con ternura, disfrutando abiertamente de la humillación de su oponente.{/n} «Adelante. Admite que eres deficiente mental y que todo tu saber es un montón de conjeturas y rituales absurdos».

languages.text: "Basit mantıktan nesnel gerçeklere geçtin ancak hâlâ sonucu belirtmeyi başaramadın." {n}Şefkate yakın bir tonda konuşan Tervantias, rakibinin aşağılanmasından açıkça zevk alıyor.{/n} "Hadi. Tüm bilgi birikimi şüpheli tahminler ve aptalca ayinlerden ibaret olan, zihinsel olarak yetersiz bir hiç olduğunu itiraf et."
languages.original_text: "You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

traits.locale_text: "Basit mantıktan nesnel gerçeklere geçtin ancak hâlâ sonucu belirtmeyi başaramadın." {n}Şefkate yakın bir tonda konuşan Tervantias, rakibinin aşağılanmasından açıkça zevk alıyor.{/n} "Hadi. Tüm bilgi birikimi şüpheli tahminler ve aptalca ayinlerden ibaret olan, zihinsel olarak yetersiz bir hiç olduğunu itiraf et."

languages.text: “你从简单推理转向了客观事实，却始终不敢把结论说出口。”{n}特万提亚斯的语气近乎温柔，毫不遮掩地享受着对方的屈辱。{/n}“那就说出来吧。承认你不过是个心智不全、毫无价值的废物，你那套所谓的学识，不过是一堆可疑的臆测和愚蠢的仪式。”
languages.original_text: "You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

traits.locale_text: “你从简单推理转向了客观事实，却始终不敢把结论说出口。”{n}特万提亚斯的语气近乎温柔，毫不遮掩地享受着对方的屈辱。{/n}“那就说出来吧。承认你不过是个心智不全、毫无价值的废物，你那套所谓的学识，不过是一堆可疑的臆测和愚蠢的仪式。”

languages.text: 「貴様は単純な推論から客観的事実へと進んだが、それでもなお、結論を述べることができずにいる」{n}テルヴァンティアスは、ほとんど優しげにすら語り、相手の屈辱を露骨に味わっている。{/n}「ならば、やってみせろ。貴様が、知識の総体など怪しげな当て推量と愚かな儀式の山にすぎぬ、知的に欠陥のある取るに足らぬ存在だと認めるのだ」
languages.original_text: "You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."

traits.locale_text: 「貴様は単純な推論から客観的事実へと進んだが、それでもなお、結論を述べることができずにいる」{n}テルヴァンティアスは、ほとんど優しげにすら語り、相手の屈辱を露骨に味わっている。{/n}「ならば、やってみせろ。貴様が、知識の総体など怪しげな当て推量と愚かな儀式の山にすぎぬ、知的に欠陥のある取るに足らぬ存在だと認めるのだ」
